seo_description: Current time in Manchester, England — live GMT/BST clock, DST schedule, and time differences with London, New York, and world cities.

faq.question: What time is it in Manchester right now?
faq.answer: Manchester, England, UK uses Greenwich Mean Time (GMT, UTC+0) in winter and British Summer Time (BST, UTC+1) during Daylight Saving Time in summer. Clocks spring forward on the last Sunday in March and fall back on the last Sunday in October. Manchester is on the same timezone as London. The IANA timezone identifier is Europe/London.

faq.question: What time zone is Manchester in?
faq.answer: Manchester is in the GMT/BST timezone (UTC+0 in winter, UTC+1 in summer). England uses the Europe/London IANA timezone identifier. Manchester, London, Birmingham, and Liverpool all share this timezone. The IANA identifier is Europe/London.

faq.question: Does Manchester observe daylight saving time?
faq.answer: Yes. England and the rest of the UK observe British Summer Time (BST). Clocks spring forward 1 hour to BST (UTC+1) on the last Sunday in March at 1:00 AM and fall back to GMT (UTC+0) on the last Sunday in October at 2:00 AM. Manchester follows UK DST rules, the same as London.

faq.question: What is the time difference between Manchester and London?
faq.answer: Manchester and London are on the same timezone year-round (Europe/London, GMT/BST). There is no time difference between Manchester and London at any time of year.

faq.question: What is the time difference between Manchester and New York?
faq.answer: Manchester (GMT, UTC+0) is 5 hours ahead of New York (EST, UTC-5) in winter. During US Daylight Saving Time (EDT, UTC-4), Manchester is 4 hours ahead. During UK summer (BST, UTC+1), Manchester is 5 hours ahead of EDT. The gap varies from 4–5 hours depending on the time of year.

faq.question: What is the time difference between Manchester and Dubai?
faq.answer: Manchester (GMT, UTC+0) is 4 hours behind Dubai (GST, UTC+4) in winter. During UK summer (BST, UTC+1), Manchester is 3 hours behind Dubai. Dubai has no DST, so the gap is 4 hours in winter and 3 hours in UK summer.

faq.question: What are typical business hours in Manchester?
faq.answer: Standard business hours in Manchester are 9:00 AM to 5:30 PM GMT/BST, Monday through Friday. Manchester is England's second-largest city and a major global centre for finance, media, education, and technology. It is home to MediaCityUK (BBC, ITV), Manchester United, Manchester City, the University of Manchester, and significant financial services. The Northern Powerhouse economic zone is centred on Manchester. Major employers include AstraZeneca, Siemens, and Amazon.
